scope: GLS Collective WooCommerce Store API (category QUINCEANERA), one catalog row per (style, color).
notes: Single source: the public Store API returns colors, images, price, sizes, and description per product — no HTML scrape.
Color comes from the Color attribute (orderable variant axis); images are grouped to a color by the color token in each filename.
Retail price is captured in source.price_cents; whether it populates the catalog's pre-fill price is an import-time choice.
Public codes are null because the app mints them on import.
